message:
🌱 Add cri-o: Support pulling an image specified by both tag and digest mission (#1599)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "cri-o-2351-support-pulling-an-image-specified-by-both-tag-and-digest",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "cri-o: Support pulling an image specified by both tag and digest",
+    "description": "Support pulling an image specified by both tag and digest. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current cri-o deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your cri-o version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cri-o -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cri-o\nhelm list -n cri-o 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working cri-o installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review cri-o configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant cri-o configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n cri-o -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cri-o\nkubectl get configmap -n cri-o -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=cri-o\n```\n**Description**\n\nHi all! Currently trying to get skaffold to work. Skaffold works by pulling an image specified by both tag and digest."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Support pulling an image specified by both tag and digest",
+        "description": "Favour the digest over the tag if both specified.\nThis is required for docker compatibility.\r\n\n_Docker supports canonical image references (`repo/image:tag`) that contain both a tag and an image ID. The latter is actually used for resolution. Despite its ambiguity this feature is used by tools like\n```yaml\nroot@a1:~# crio --version\ncrio version 1.13.1-dev\ncommit: \"\"\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade cri-o to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade cri-o:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade cri-o cri-o/cri-o --namespace cri-o\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cri-o\nhelm list -n cri-o\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cri-o -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cri-o\nkubectl get events -n cri-o --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Support pulling an image specified by both tag and digest\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Favour the digest over the tag if both specified.\nThis is required for docker compatibility.\r\n\n_Docker supports canonical image references (`repo/image:tag`) that contain both a tag and an image ID. The latter is actually used for resolution.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "root@a1:~# crio --version\ncrio version 1.13.1-dev\ncommit: \"\""
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "cri-o",
+      "graduated",
+      "runtime",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "cri-o"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/cri-o/cri-o/issues/2351",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/cri-o/cri-o",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/cri-o/cri-o/pull/3060"
+    },
+    "reactions": 2,
+    "comments": 11,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with cri-o installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
